## [00:00 - 01:27]

I get imposter syndrome. Again, this is the most insane thing. Virtually they got me for a big event. 36,000 people online. They paid 110,000 USD. I did it for my garage. But I tell you this for a reason. When I speak to my mentors about imposter syndrome, they teach me something. They said, Vin, do you know why they pay you this? It's because the ability to communicate, the ability to inspire, the ability to move people and educate people, it's one of the highest paid skill sets in the world. Period. I want you to think about this for a moment. I'm not saying you're all going to become keynote speakers. Please don't. I don't need the competition. But what I'm saying is you're all here for the next two days to learn one of the most valuable skill sets in the world. No, imagine taking one of the most valuable skill sets in the world and injecting it into your career path, whatever it may be for you right now. Just imagine for a second what that would be and what that would mean for you. What kind of impact could you have? What kind of influence could you have? Just think about that for a second. For the next two days, we're learning the most valuable skill set in the world. You
